mapper.select: SELECT id, name, pid, uuid, sex, photo, birthday, school, degree, tel, address, email, job, remark, description, hiredate, tag, recommended, status, create_time FROM gas_worker WHERE tel = #{tel} AND status = 1

SELECT id, name, pid, uuid, sex, photo, birthday, school, degree, tel, address, email, job, remark, description, hiredate, tag, recommended, status, create_time FROM gas_worker WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
